MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-22-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER GRANTING KPMG LLP'S UNOPPOSED PETITION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS PURSUANT TO CCP 2029.600
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER GRANTING KPMG LLP'S UNOPPOSED EX PARTE PETITION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS FILED BY PETITIONER KPMG LLP

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER KPMG LLP'S NOTICE OF PETITION AND UNOPPOSED PETITTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS PURSUANT TO CCP 2029.600 IS GRANTED, FOR REASONS SET FORTH IN MOVING PAPERS AND REQUEST IS UNOPPOSED. GRANT THORNTON LLP IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO THE SUBJECT SUBPOENA AND AN EXECUTED DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. GRANT THORNTON'S PRODUCTION IS TO BE TREATED AS COVERED BY THE AUGUST 27, 2012 CONSENT PROTECTIVE ORDER ENTERED IN THE UNDERLYING FULTON COUNTY, GEORGIA LITIGATION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petititon And Unopposed Petittion To Compel Production Of Docum,Ents Pursant To Ccp 2029.600
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Oliver Dunlap, King & Spalding, 415.318.1200, appearing for the KPMG LLP;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

There being no other appearances, the Court adopted the tentative ruling: PETITIONER KPMG LLP'S Notice Of Petition And Unopposed Petittion To Compel Production Of Documents Pursuant To CCP 2029.600 is Granted, for reasons set forth in moving papers and request is unopposed. Grant Thornton LLP is ordered to produce documents responsive to the subject subpoena and an executed Declaration of Custodian of Records within 10 days of this order. Grant Thornton's production is to be treated as covered by the August 27, 2012 Consent Protective Order entered in the underlying Fulton County, Georgia litigation. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not reported. =(302/JPT)
